title: eleocharis caribaea
intro: Eleocharis caribaea, also known as Caribbean spikes-grass, is a type of sedge plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, Eleocharis caribaea is used in folk medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and dermatitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
